description: Sector overlay for telecommunications operators, internet/data service providers, infrastructure providers, spectrum/frequency authorisations, SIM/numbering services, and telecom cybersecurity documentation in Ghana.

metadata.scope: Ghana-only sector overlay controls for Telecoms. Intended to be used with ghana_core_control_library.
metadata.source_note: Source basis is mapped from official Ghana legal/regulatory sources available at rule-pack publication time. This starter pack is not legal advice and requires expert validation before production reliance.
metadata.external_knowledge_policy: No external knowledge is introduced during document evaluation. Regulatory source mappings live only in this versioned rule pack.

rules.title: NCA telecommunications licence or authorisation evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for NCA mobile, fixed, broadband, data service, satellite, infrastructure, submarine cable, numbering, spectrum, or telecom licence evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Ghana legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, legal sufficiency, source currency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: Subscriber, SIM, numbering, or customer registration controls are documented
rules.summary: Checks for SIM registration, subscriber identity, numbering, M2M, KYC, customer registration, or verification controls.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Ghana legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, legal sufficiency, source currency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: Telecom cybersecurity, NCA-CERT, incident, or network-security controls are documented
rules.summary: Checks for cybersecurity, network security, NCA-CERT, incident reporting, malware, vulnerability, monitoring, or resilience evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Ghana legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, legal sufficiency, source currency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: Subscriber, traffic, or customer data-protection controls are documented
rules.summary: Checks for privacy notice, data protection, subscriber data, call data records, traffic data, retention, consent, or lawful disclosure evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Ghana legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, legal sufficiency, source currency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.
